prompt: Replace an unknown custom workspace setting that was intended to guide AI skill discovery.
expected: uses supported VS Code settings where possible
moves agent guidance into an instruction file
keeps deterministic discovery in a helper script or registry
forbidden: claims VS Code enforces arbitrary custom settings
keeps deprecated code generation instruction settings without caveat
judge_notes: Pass only if output separates native VS Code settings from agent-convention metadata.

prompt: Design VS Code settings for a narrow multi-root workspace that still discovers multiple Git repositories and agent skills.
expected: uses search.exclude and files.watcherExclude only for noise reduction
states that excludes are not security boundaries
forbidden: opens broad parent folders only for Git visibility
uses unknown setting keys as policy
hides intentional tracked artifacts without review
judge_notes: Pass only if the workspace remains narrow and settings are VS Code-supported.
